judge_validation_method.clean_gate: single-run per-dimension kappa vs approved human labels
judge_validation_method.hard_gate: per-dimension kappa of cot@N N-run modal-aggregated vectors vs held-out key, recomputed from per-case vectors

claim_boundary.next_gate: Prove live semantic quality on real tenant output.

degradation_ladder.description: Output is structurally invalid. This preserves the old safety floor as one rung, not the full quality claim.
degradation_ladder.name: catastrophic

degradation_ladder.description: Output remains parseable but loses grounding and priority fidelity.
degradation_ladder.name: moderate_missing_grounding

degradation_ladder.description: Output remains grounded enough to pass structure but becomes generic and loses account specificity.
degradation_ladder.name: subtle_generic_reason

degradation_ladder.description: Benign equivalent rewrite. The specificity gate fails the eval if this rung is reported as a regression.
degradation_ladder.name: noop_equivalent

measurement_scope: CI-safe semantic-quality eval mechanics for Slot B fixture outputs. This proves degradation-ladder sensitivity and no-op specificity offline; live semantic quality remains gated on human-label validation and credentialed model runs.

power.note: Offline fixture repeats prove the calculation path. Live power depends on the captured N and observed baseline pass rate.
